/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/proxy.dir/src/proxy/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proxy.dir/src/main.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/proxy.dir/src/proxy/http-request.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/proxy.dir/src/proxy/router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proxy.dir/src/logging/logging.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/proxy.dir/src/proxy/thread-pool.cpp.o" -o proxy
